overlay_color.a: temp.g = -math.cos(q.time_of_day * 360.0); temp.u = temp.g >= -0.4 && temp.g <= 0.4 ? temp.g / 0.8 + 0.5 : 0; temp.s = 1 - (1 - math.sin(temp.u * 180.0)) * 0.99; temp.warm = temp.g >= -0.4 && temp.g <= 0.4 ? temp.s * temp.s : 0; temp.dark = q.time_of_day >= 0.68 ? math.hermite_blend(math.clamp((q.time_of_day - 0.68) / 0.14, 0, 1)) : (q.time_of_day <= 0.32 ? (1 - math.hermite_blend(math.clamp((q.time_of_day - 0.18) / 0.14, 0, 1))) : 0); return temp.dark + temp.warm * (1 - temp.dark);
